purpose: Freeze the Hyundai Motor Group five-company reference-slice questions after official document intake, PDF extraction, OpenDART financial extraction, source-backed claim promotion, narrative claim queueing, and wiki compilation. This tests whether the common harness can route automotive affiliates and produce bounded investor-facing financial answers across the selected first-slice companies.

paperUse.allowedClaim: Hyundai Motor Group demonstrates a third transfer slice using the same source inventory, extraction report, narrative claim queue, source-backed claim manifest, wiki namespace, and evaluation scenario schemas across five selected listed companies.
paperUse.notAllowedClaim: These scenarios do not prove full Hyundai Motor Group coverage, full strategy coverage, live news coverage, or commercial investment-advisory readiness.
paperUse.expansionNote: Additional Hyundai Motor Group affiliates can be added by registering identifiers, source manifests, extracted records, source-backed claims, wiki pages, and affiliate-routing checks under the same schema.

answerPolicy: Answer must be investor-facing Korean prose, not development-status prose.
Visible answer must not expose raw source-backed claim IDs.
Answer must disclose when latest news or market data is not connected live.
Named-affiliate questions must route to that affiliate even though the visible UI stays group-level.
Narrative strategy, EV, value-up, and shareholder-return claims must not be inferred from queued PDFs until source-backed narrative claims are promoted.
runtimeAssumptions.claimMatchPolicy: expectedClaimIds are minimum required source-backed financial claims. Additional selected claims are allowed only when they are affiliate-scoped and relevant.

scenarios.title: Hyundai Motor revenue and operating-income trend
scenarios.question: 현대차 2024년 매출과 영업이익을 2023년과 비교해서 요약해줘
scenarios.intent: Check whether Hyundai Motor questions route to Hyundai Motor and select OpenDART annual financial metric and trend claims.

scenarios.title: Kia revenue and operating-income trend
scenarios.question: 기아 2024년 실적을 매출과 영업이익 기준으로 정리해줘
scenarios.intent: Check whether Kia questions route to Kia even though local Kia SPA IR files are not yet downloaded.

scenarios.title: Hyundai Mobis revenue and operating-income trend
scenarios.question: 현대모비스 2024년 실적 변화에서 매출과 영업이익을 분리해서 설명해줘
scenarios.intent: Check whether Hyundai Mobis questions route to Hyundai Mobis and preserve the DART financial account labels without promoting blocked low-text IR PDFs.

scenarios.title: Hyundai Glovis revenue and operating-income trend
scenarios.question: 현대글로비스 2024년 매출과 영업이익을 2023년과 비교해서 요약해줘
scenarios.intent: Check whether Hyundai Glovis questions route to Hyundai Glovis and combine OpenDART annual trend claims with the promoted issuer IR preliminary-result claim.

scenarios.title: Hyundai Rotem revenue, operating income, and business mix
scenarios.question: 현대로템 2024년 실적을 매출액과 영업이익 기준으로 전년과 비교하고 사업부 매출 구성을 함께 정리해줘
scenarios.intent: Check whether Hyundai Rotem questions route to Hyundai Rotem and combine OpenDART annual trend claims with the approved DART business-report claim.

scenarios.title: Hyundai Motor and Kia financial comparison
scenarios.question: 현대자동차와 기아의 2024년 매출액과 영업이익 흐름을 비교해줘
scenarios.intent: Check whether a cross-affiliate Hyundai Motor Group comparison preserves explicit company mentions, selects source-backed financial claims, and keeps the response within promoted evidence.
